feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Can we develop an Ashynchronus API in the S/4 Hana On-Premises System?
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a requirement that we need to develop an Ashynchronus API in the S/4 Hana On-Premise system. Is it possible or not?

entry.title: Create new system copyng existing system
entry.content:
Hi,

I need to create a new Sandbox S/4 Hana 2021 system with an existing S/4 Hana source system

Usually I use "Refresh or Move database Instance" to copy an origin system to an existing target system.

In my new scenario, new system from scratch, do I need to

  1. install a fresh S/4 Hana 2021 system
  2. execute  "Refresh or Move database Instance"  

?

Could I do in only one run, instead?

Thanks a lot

Mario

entry.title: PS budget migration from legacy system
entry.content:
Hi Expert, 

If it possible to migrate PS full budget data (original budget/ budget consumption) from legacy system to a new S/4HANA system. For example : WBS in legacy system the original budget = 1000, consumption = 800, available = 200. In general, I will only migrate original budget = 200 to new system, because I will not migrate all the detail transactions of the WBS. But my customer's requirement is migrate  original budget = 1000, consumption = 800 to new system because they want to trace the full cycle in new system. If someone have the same experience? By the way, the WBS is real WBS not statistic.

Thanks and Best Regards,

entry.title: How can we create a customer influence in S/4HANA for P2P
entry.content:
Hello,

Can someone give me the right link to post a customer influence for S/4 in Procurement? 

We need to raise a business needs for the creation of a vendor calendar in order to :

- Put the holiday of the supplier on this calendar

- Based on these holidays, create pop up to users

- Based on these holiday, to have a link in MRP for the planning.

I only find the link to customer influence S/4 private, and no purchasing area inside.

Thank you

Ingrid

entry.title: BRF+; sales order confirmation on item level
entry.content: We are using BRF+ to submit the EDI sales order confirmation (ORDER_CONFIRMATION) and order changes (ORDER_CONFIRMATION_CHANGE). By standard this is a header message, but we want to have this on item level. Only comfirmed items should be in the message for standard items, and third party items should be included when the PO is created and confirmed. Every time a sales order item is confirmed, a new message should be triggered containing all confirmed items. So far, we could not find a way to do this using BRF+. Has anyone a solution to this issue?

entry.title: How to enhance the Request Material(MDG) App Lean App ID(F0502)
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Example Requirement: Enhance the Standard "Request Material(MDG)" app to have a Custom field and send to MDG backend staging table. From MDG the custom field will be mapped to standard Manufacture part number.

1) Front end: Is there any way to Enhance "Request Material(MDG)" via BAS and in BAS this app itself is not loading via adaptation project as the Fiori Library shows Enhancement points. In WEB IDE can we do extensions, we are using development tool BAS and how to get the license for webide full stack in BTP.

2) Backend: The Service Associated With the app is MDG_MATERIAL_SRV which should be extended with Z service can we use CFL instead of Append structure.

entry.title: EWM Putaway Storage Section Indicator Defaulting to Incorrect Putaway Bin
entry.content: Product does not have a Fixed Bin assigned and the Putaway Storage Section Indicator is set to HTZN in EWM Product Master Data, then the assumption is the automatic warehouse task Storage Bin for Putaway should go to a Bin with the Storage Section HTZN, it does not.

entry.title: Hello Team,I have written a new blog on SAP VMS. But I am unable to find the link of it.
entry.content:
I want to know status of my new blog. Please guide. I also want to attach a pdf detailed document to it. But it was not allowing me to attach it. Please help urgently.

Thanks

Nabanita

entry.title: Advanced Intercompany Sales(5D2) - IC Supplier Invoice not created but no error
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I'm testing Advanced Intercompany Sales in S/4HANA 2023 and have done all the settings as Advanced Intercompany Sales (5D2) .

 
All the other processes are done successfully, but the supplier invoice is not auto created after Intercompany billing is created. No error message in the message log, and no "reprocess" or "process" can be pressed.

 

 

 

 


I've checked
1. Note 3325233 - Advanced Intercompany Sales: Wrong check for intercompany supplier invoice
2. Note 3326194 - (Advanced Intercompany Sales) Support of Company-Specific Supplier Numbers
3. Blog - Advanced Intercompany Stock Transfer failed to create Supplier Invoice
but those are not my case.

Could anyone suggest how to process this supplier invoice?

Thanks in advance.

Best regards,
SH

entry.title: Sales order confirmation on item level
entry.content: Using Output Parameter Determination, the sales order confirmation (EDI in this case) is issued on header level. Is it possible to configure this on item level? Customer requests confirmation messages every time when a sales order item is confirmed. Hopefully someone can provide a solution to this issue. Thanks!

entry.title: Invoice is generated with negative net value SAP SD
entry.content:
Hey All,

When I try to create a sales order the PPR0 price condition is given, delivery document is generated for the same but when I try to create an invoice with that it's being generated with negative value, once I give the update on the pricing tab then that negative value is going away, can anyone out there help me out why it's giving negative value at the creation of invoice from VF01?

What could be possible options I can check here?

I checked the pricing determination, condition records but seems all good for me.

Please provide some guidance SD (Sales and Distribution) SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud SAP S/4HANA SAP Sales Order Notification SD Billing SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Sales 

Thanks,

entry.title: Is there a way other than condition contracts to pay commissions?
entry.content:
Good afternoon,

Was hoping that someone could provide an alternative to condition contracts.  We are recently live with S/4 Hana private cloud.  While going through UAT with users, they felt that creating and managing condition contracts was extremely complex and too many clicks, to which I agree to a point.  Everything has to be exactly correct for a commission to accrue.

I am hoping, since our business earns contracts based on sales order, there might be a condition that can be used to perform the same function.

 

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Multiple SAP Instance and Non-SAP Data | SAP ICMR
entry.content:
Hi, 

How can we configure ICMR in a way which involves fetching data from multiple SAP instances(for ACDOCA) as well as Non-SAP systems for Intercompany matching and reconciliation?

entry.title: I am truing to extend the app F1515 using adaptation project on BAS
entry.content:
I am attempting to extend the app using the adaptation project in BAS. My query is how to consume the URL defined in the SAP BTP destination. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: 关于销售订单与交货数量及开票数量的问题
entry.content:
在创建销售订单时，已确定订单数量。

1、由于生产过程中存在正常的损耗，所以交货数量是实际产出的合格数量，而开票数量可能等于实际合格品的交货数量，也可能等于订单数量。

2、当一段时间后对客户进行不合格品交货时，不需要给客户开票，也不需要向客户收款。

针对以上业务情况，在配置为参考交货单开票的情况下：

1、如何实现在开票时修改开票数量。

2、如何实现在创建交货单时，选择不开票。

entry.title: Old values are restating while updating the withholding tax
entry.content: While updating the withholding tax codes in BP, system is automatically restates the tax category field value in Identification tab of BP general data.

entry.title: 309 transfer posting asking to Enter sales order
entry.content: Material to Material transfer in same plant is asking for Sales Order. I do not have a salesorder

entry.title: SAP ECC to S/4HANA with Qlik Sense
entry.content:
Hello,

Need advice on the best strategy for migrating from SAP ECC to S/4HANA while using Qlik Sense: should we maintain daily data extractions with Qlik using SAP tables, or opt to use CDS views? Bearing in mind that the latter option would require a complete adaptation of all Qlik applications? If so, would this adaptation be sensible and easy to undertake?

Thanks!

entry.title: In the Recent Version(2402), SAP S/4 Hana Cloud, Is there provision for Configuring Funds Management
entry.content: In the Recent Version(2402), SAP S/4 Hana Public Cloud, Is there provision for Configuring Funds Management if not then How to proceed ?

entry.title: Capacity report (/SAPAPO/CDPS_REPT)
entry.content:
Hello

i have a question in capacity report

in resource utilization - capacity field 

can anyone explain how the capacity is calculated

thanks
